message:
✨ Add liveInDemoMode option so nightly E2E card fetches live data on Netlify

The useCache hook skips fetching entirely in demo mode. Add a
liveInDemoMode option that bypasses the demo mode check, allowing
cards backed by Netlify Functions to always fetch live data.

Wire it in useNightlyE2EData so the Nightly E2E Status card shows
real GitHub Actions data on console.kubestellar.io instead of demo.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
